The Practice

Union-trained.
Family-run. Built here.

Made in the U.S.A.

Most electrical work is invisible. That's the point, and that's where the craft lives.

Sestito Electrical LLC is a small, Middleton-based shop founded in 2020. We specialize in high-end residential work for homeowners, architects, and builders who care about what's behind the walls as much as what's on them.

Every project is led personally by Stefano Sestito, a twenty-year IBEW journeyman and former foreman on some of New England's most demanding electrical installations. You get one master electrician on every job, on every visit. No sub-par subs. No corners cut.

Whether it's one outlet or a whole house, the standard is the same.

20
Years in the
electrical trade
100%
Licensed, bonded
& insured
IBEW
Union-trained
Local 103 foreman
Where We Work

Rooted on the
North Shore.
Ready to travel
when it counts.

Home base is Middleton. Most weeks our trucks are on job sites across Essex and Middlesex counties.

For larger projects, full new-construction luxury homes, estate renovations, commercial build-outs, or multi-phase work, Stefano regularly travels across Massachusetts, southern New Hampshire, and Rhode Island. If the scope justifies the drive, we show up. Not sure whether your project qualifies? Call and ask. It's a conversation, not a commitment.

What We Do

Several specialties.
One set of standards.

From a single EV charger to a full luxury new-build, these are the jobs we see most often, but the list is far from exhaustive. If you don't see your project here, call. Odds are we've done it.

01

Luxury Residential

Whole-home wiring for new construction and major renovations.
+

Full-home new construction, gut renovations, and additions for custom homes from 4,000 to 15,000+ square feet. We work closely with architects, interior designers, and GCs to plan systems that integrate with the finished design, not fight it. Every home gets a full circuit map, labeled panel, and a walkthrough with the owner at sign-off.

  • Whole-home new construction wiring
  • Major gut renovations
  • Lighting plans & circuit design
  • Low-voltage pre-wire (network, audio, cameras)
  • Automation-ready infrastructure
  • Architect & builder collaboration
Talk to Stefano →
02

EV Chargers

Tesla, ChargePoint, Wallbox, and hardwired Level 2 installs.
+

From a single Tesla Wall Connector in a garage to a four-bay commercial charging setup, we handle the load calculation, dedicated circuit, conduit run, and final commissioning. We also retrofit existing panels when an EV charger pushes the house past its current service capacity.

  • Tesla Wall Connector & Gen 3 installs
  • Universal J1772 & NACS Level 2
  • ChargePoint, Wallbox, Enphase, Emporia
  • Load calculations & service upgrades as needed
  • Dedicated 240V / 50A+ circuits
  • Smart-home integration
Talk to Stefano →
03

Service Upgrades

100A to 400A panel upgrades. Heavy-ups, sub-panels, generator interlocks.
+

Old homes on 100A service running modern loads (EVs, heat pumps, spa tubs) need an upgrade before anything else can be added safely. We handle full service replacements, meter relocations, mast work with the utility, and sub-panel additions in finished basements, detached garages, or pool houses.

  • 100A / 200A / 320A / 400A service upgrades
  • Meter socket replacement & relocation
  • Sub-panels for additions, garages, pool houses
  • Generator transfer switches & interlock kits
  • Coordination with National Grid / Eversource
  • Inspection-ready, permit pulled
Talk to Stefano →
04

Saunas, Spas & Pools

GFCI-protected wiring for hot tubs, saunas, pools, pool pumps, and equipment sheds.
+

Water and electricity need a specialist. Every installation we do is permit-pulled, GFCI-protected, bonded per NEC code, and pressure-tested before sign-off. We coordinate with pool builders, spa installers, and landscape architects to run feeds before the patio goes in.

  • 240V hot tub & spa circuits
  • Indoor & outdoor sauna installs
  • In-ground pool pumps, lights, heaters
  • Equipment shed wiring & sub-panels
  • Pool bonding grid per NEC 680
  • GFCI protection on all wet-location circuits
Talk to Stefano →
05

Outdoor Lighting & Fountains

Landscape lighting, pathway systems, fountains, facade illumination.
+

Done right, outdoor lighting transforms a property at night. We install low-voltage landscape systems with proper transformer sizing, weatherproof fittings, and photocell/timer controls. We also wire water features, decorative fountains, and architectural facade lighting for high-end residential and commercial projects.

  • Low-voltage landscape & pathway lighting
  • Architectural facade illumination
  • Water-feature & fountain pumps
  • Outdoor outlet circuits for patios & decks
  • Photocell & smart timer controls
  • Weatherproof fittings rated for MA climate
Talk to Stefano →
06

Commercial Fit-outs

Retail, office, medical, and hospitality electrical installations.
+

We bring foreman-level experience from large-scale projects (including Patriot Place at Gillette Stadium and Mass General Brigham hospital systems) to smaller commercial fit-outs. Tenant improvements, retail build-outs, medical offices, and restaurant installations are our sweet spot.

  • Retail tenant build-outs
  • Office & medical office fit-outs
  • Restaurant & hospitality spaces
  • Lighting & controls for public spaces
  • Emergency & exit lighting code compliance
  • After-hours & weekend work for occupied sites
Talk to Stefano →
07

Generators & Backup Power

Standby generator installation, transfer switches, whole-home battery.
+

A standby generator is one of the best investments a North Shore homeowner can make. Between winter storms and aging utility infrastructure, power goes out more often than anyone would like. We install natural-gas and propane standby units sized for your actual load, plus whole-home battery systems.

  • Standby generator installs (Generac, Kohler)
  • Automatic transfer switches
  • Tesla Powerwall & Enphase battery systems
  • Load shedding & priority circuit setup
  • Annual maintenance & service
  • Gas line coordination with licensed plumber
Talk to Stefano →
08

Troubleshooting & Repair

Diagnostics for flickering lights, tripped breakers, failed circuits, code violations.
+

When something's wrong and you don't know why, a foreman-trained electrician finds it fast. We troubleshoot flickering lights, nuisance breaker trips, dead outlets, loose connections, and issues from prior work that didn't meet code. Honest diagnostics, straight answers, and no upsell.

  • Dead outlet & circuit diagnosis
  • Flickering light & voltage drop issues
  • Breaker trip investigation
  • Code-violation corrections from prior work
  • Pre-purchase home inspection electrical review
  • Aluminum wiring remediation (AlumiConn)
Talk to Stefano →
09

& everything else

Something on this list missing? Call. Odds are we do that too.
→

These are the projects we take on most often, but the list isn't exhaustive. If you don't see what you need, pick up the phone. If it runs on electricity, there's a good chance Stefano has wired it.

Stefano SestitoOwner / Operator / Master Electrician
The Owner / Operator

Twenty years in. One name on every job.

A union electrician, a small-business owner, and a dad of three from Middleton.

Stefano is a licensed master electrician and twenty-year IBEW Local 103 member. He founded Sestito Electrical in 2020 after years as a foreman for McDonald Electrical, running crews on Boston's most complex installations.

A foreman's eye for sequencing. A union hand's standard for craftsmanship. A father's sense of what a home is supposed to be.

20 Years
McDonald Electrical / ForemanMass General Brigham hospitals and the Patriot Place build-out at Gillette Stadium.
IBEW
Local 103 / JourneymanUnion-trained under the Joint Apprenticeship & Training Committee.
Since 2020
Sestito Electrical / Owner / OperatorPersonally on-site for every project across the North Shore and beyond.
How We Work

Clear from the first call.
Clean when we leave.

From site walk to sign-off, the process is built around keeping you informed, your home respected, and your electrical system flawless.

01

Site walk

On-site assessment, scope discussion, and honest advice about what the job actually needs. Nothing more.

02

Written estimate

Itemized, transparent pricing within days. Permit and inspection costs always included up front.

03

The work

Stefano is on-site. Daily photo updates for larger projects. Tidy workspace, respected household.

04

Sign-off

Load-testing, inspector walkthrough, and a complete circuit map handed over. We stand behind every joint.

“
The wires you can't see are the ones that matter most. Do those right, and everything else takes care of itself.
Stefano Sestito / Master Electrician / Middleton, Mass.
